By using templates, you can save time and reduce the risk of errors. * **Create custom fields**: Custom fields allow you to add additional information to your records, making it easier to track and analyze data. With Base44, you can create up to 20 custom fields per record type. * **Use views**: Views are custom lists of records that can be filtered and sorted to show specific information. By using views, you can quickly access the data you need and make informed decisions.
